backstory.original: A former member of the Dripping Fang clan, Deekin was once a Skald for a White Dragon named Tymofarrar. Once he was released from Tymofarrar's service, he set out to become the most amazing storyteller in all of Faerûn. He yearns to sing and tell stories of heroic deeds, but his songs often devolve into 'tales' of the doom that is coming to him or his companions.
backstory.display: 德金是滴血毒牙氏族的前成员，曾经为一只名叫泰默法拉的白龙担任吟游诗人。从泰默法拉的麾下离开后，他开始成为整个费伦最了不起的说书人。他渴望歌唱和讲述英雄事迹，但他的歌声却常常演变成他或他的同伴即将面临厄运的“故事”。

description.original: Deekin takes aim with his crossbow and fires at a random enemy.
description.display: 德金用弩弓瞄准并向一名随机敌人发射。

description.original: Deekin shouts DOOM as loudly as he can, dealing massive damage and buffing Story of Doom.
description.display: 德金用尽最大的力气喊出“厄运”，造成高额伤害并增益厄运故事。

longDescription.original: Deekin shouts DOOM as loud as he can, dealing massive damage and setting Story of Doom to max stacks for 30 seconds.
longDescription.display: 德金用尽最大的力气喊出“厄运”，造成高额伤害，同时使厄运故事堆叠至最高层数，持续 30 秒。

description.original: Deekin increases the damage of those adjacent to him. The buff increases rapidly over time, but is reduced by monster kills.
description.display: 德金提高与他相邻勇士的伤害。增益会随时间快速提高，但会因为击杀怪物而降低。

description.original: When Deekin's Story of Doom stacks are low, monsters spawn more quickly.
description.display: 德金的厄运故事堆叠层数较低时，怪物的刷新速度会加快。

description.desc: Deekin gains a Doom stack every $stack_time___3 seconds, to a max of $max_stacks___2 stacks. Champions adjacent to Deekin do $amount% more damage per Doom stack, stacking multiplicatively. Each enemy killed reduces the current Doom stacks by $reduction_percent___3%.
德金每隔 $stack_time___3 秒获得一层“厄运”堆叠层数，最高堆叠 $max_stacks___2 层。每有一层“厄运”堆叠层数，与德金相邻的勇士额外造成 $amount% 伤害，以乘算方式堆叠。每有一名敌人被击杀，当前“厄运”堆叠层数减少 $reduction_percent___3%。

tipText.original: Deekin tells a story to those adjacent to him, increasing their damage the longer he isn't distracted. Place him next to your highest damage dealers!
tipText.display: 德金对相邻的勇士讲故事。他保持专注的时间越长，听故事者的伤害就越高。将他放置在最厉害的伤害输出者身边！

description.desc: When Deekin has $ref_value___2 or fewer stacks of Story of Doom, he causes enemies to spawn $amount% faster.
当德金拥有的“厄运故事”堆叠层数小于等于 $ref_value___2，他会使怪物的刷新速度提高 $amount%。
Deekin's Confidence in the Boss ability is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each familiar you have assigned to attacking enemies, stacking multiplicatively.
你每指派一只魔宠攻击敌人，德金的“首领信心”技能效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Deekin increases the speed that enemies spawn when you are killing them quickly. Deekin will make them spawn even faster if you have assigned familiars to attack enemies.
tipText.display: 当你迅速击杀敌人时，德金会加快敌人的刷新速度。如果你指派了魔宠来攻击敌人，德金会进一步加快敌人的刷新速度。

description.desc: Deekin increases the damage of Story of Doom by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation that is not a Standard Species, stacking multiplicatively. Standard species are Aasimar, Dragonborn, Dwarf, Elf, Gnome, Goliath, Halfling, Human, Orc, Tiefling, Half-Orc, and Half-Elf.
阵型中每有一位不是标准种族的勇士，德金会使“厄运故事”的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。标准种族是指神裔、龙裔、矮人、精灵、侏儒、巨人、半身人、人类、兽人、提夫林、半兽人和半精灵。

specializationDescription.original: The best tales come from unusual situations.
specializationDescription.display: 最精彩的故事往往源自不同寻常的情境。

description.desc: Deekin increases the damage of Story of Doom by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a Ranged base attack, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位远程基本攻击勇士，德金会使“厄运故事”的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: The best storytellers have a lot of range.
specializationDescription.display: 最优秀的讲故事者总是涉猎广泛。

description.desc: Deekin increases the effect of Story of Doom by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Bard in the formation, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位吟游诗人，德金会使“厄运故事”的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Deekin is always willing to learn from the best.
specializationDescription.display: 德金总是愿意向最优秀的人学习。

description.desc: When you complete an area with Deekin in the formation, he sets his Current Events stacks to the area number. The effect of Story of Doom is increased by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Current Events stack, stacking multiplicatively.
当你在德金位于阵型中的情况下完成一个区域，他会将他的“当前活动”堆叠层数设为区域数字。每有一层“当前活动”堆叠层数，“厄运故事”的效果提升 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
Deekin increases the effect of Story of Doom by $amount% for each Champion he is adjacent to, stacking multiplicatively. Hew Maan counts as three Champions for this ability.
每有一位勇士与德金相邻，他会使“厄运故事”的效果提升 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。此项技能会把休马恩算作三位勇士。

description.original: Deekin is most selfless kobold.
description.display: 德金是最无私的狗头人。

description.original: Deekin enjoy leading group. Everyone listen to Deekin.
description.display: 德金喜欢领导团体。所有人都听德金的。

description.original: Deekin lead you all to DOOM.
description.display: 德金带领你们所有人走向厄运。

description.original: DOOM comes for you! DOOM comes for all!
description.display: 你要完了！所有人都要完了！

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Deekin's Story of Doom ability by $amount%

description.original: Doomy doomy doom doom
description.display: 糟了，糟了，糟了，糟了

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Deekin's Story of Doom ability by $amount%

description.original: DOOM is good, yes, but what if mooore DOOM?
description.display: 厄运是不错，但要是再多来点厄运呢？

effects.description: Increases Deekin's maximum number of Doom stacks by 5

description.original: Deekin believes DOOM is for everyone!
description.display: 德金相信厄运会降临到每个人头上！

effects.description: Changes Deekin's Story of Doom ability to target all Champions

description.original: Deekin trusts boss. They would never lead Deekin wrong.
description.display: 德金相信首领。首领绝不会带领德金走错。

description.original: Deekin is not worried. Boss promised Deekin would never be scared again.
description.display: 德金并不担心。首领保证过德金永远不用再害怕了。

description.original: Deekin sing you a song?
description.display: 德金给你唱歌了？

effects.description: Increases the effect of Deekin's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Deekin starts -- you all join on the second verse!
description.display: 德金打头阵--你们都殿后！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Deekin's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Once upon a time, boss and Deekin went on several hundred adventures...
description.display: 从前，首领和德金进行过几百次冒险……

description.original: Boss and Deekin fought many, MAAAAAANY scary enemies...
description.display: 首领和德金与很多很多很多很多可怕的敌人战斗过……

description.original: Deekin stay back here where Deekin won't be seen. Deekin shy.
description.display: 德金就待在这里，这里没人看得见德金。德金害羞。

description.original: Deekin feels more confident now. Deekin wants to sing!
description.display: 德金现在感觉自信多了。德金想唱歌！

description.original: Deekin ready for anything! All eyes on Deekin! DoOoOoOoM!
description.display: 德金做好了应对一切的准备！全体看向德金！厄运！

description.original: Deekin best dodger in world. Never get hit!
description.display: 德金是世上最好的闪避者，从未被击中过！

description.original: Deekin lifts from knees, never back!
description.display: 德金是用膝盖，不是用背！

name.original: Bard of the Dragon Queen Deekin

description.original: Deekin great kobold hero, but still just little kobold.
description.display: 德金虽然是狗头人的大英雄，但终究只是个渺小的狗头人。

description.original: Ooo! You wants to hear Deekin sing! Deekin gladly sing for hero!
description.display: 哦？你想要听德金唱歌？德金其实很乐意为英雄豪杰高歌一曲！

description.original: The suspense builds! The music swells!
description.display: 琵琶一曲肠堪断，风萧萧兮夜漫漫！

description.original: He forgets how it goes, but nobody knows, 'cause Deekin's singing a so-ooong!!
description.display: 他忘了歌词，但却没人察觉，因为德金正在引吭高歌！！

description.original: Is you talking to Deekin? You not the boss, so Deekin not gots to talk to you.
description.display: 你是跟德金说话？你不是老大，德金才不搭理你。

description.original: Has Deekin told you recently about doom?
description.display: 德金有跟你说过十字弩的故事吗？

description.original: Is hard to write epic story when blood be everywhere.
description.display: 在浴血奋战时，的确难以抽空撰写一篇传奇故事。

description.original: Doom doom DOOM! Doomity doom doom DOOM! You like?
description.display: 厄运难逃！死亡的声音在空气中回荡！喜欢吗？

description.original: Ummm... Deekin not feels so good.
description.display: 唔......德金整个人都不太好了。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Deekin's Story of Doom ability by $amount%

description.original: Maybe Deekin pencil you in as sidekick?
description.display: 也许可以把你写作德金的搭档？

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Deekin's Story of Doom ability by $amount%

description.original: Deekin busy writing great, epic tale, so he not gots time to talk to you.
description.display: 德金在忙着撰写史诗级传奇故事，没空搭理你。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Deekin's Story of Doom ability by $amount%

description.original: Lots of epic story gets cut out. But not the doom. No. Never the Doom. . .
description.display: 被迫删减了很多传奇故事。唯有厄运故事是例外。对，绝对不能动厄运故事......

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Deekin's Story of Doom ability by $amount%

description.original: Heh... Deekin just thinkings to that one time you yells at Deekin. Ahhh, good times...
description.display: 唉......德金不禁回想起那一次你对迪金大吼出声。往事不可追忆啊......

effects.description: Increases the effect of Deekin's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Stop Deekin if you've heard this one: There once was a man from the Moonsea. . .
description.display: 你若是已经听过这个故事的话可以打断德金：很久以前有一个来自月海的人......

effects.description: Increases the effect of Deekin's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Deekin might have shiny bracers, but Deekin still gots bad back.
description.display: 德金虽然佩戴着闪亮的护腕，但却护不住疼痛的后背。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Deekin's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: And suddenly, boss came upon the lair of their enemy! Huzzah!
description.display: 说时迟那时快，老大突然从天而降出现在敌人的大本营！呜哇！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Deekin's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: Deekin feel like bag of clamshells bashed on ground repeatedly. Overall is good.
description.display: 德金感觉自己像是被装在袋子中不断被抨击的蛤壳一样。整体而言状态还行吧。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Deekin's Middle of the Action ability by $amount%

description.original: The boss and Deekin, faithful kobold companion, continue their voyage.
description.display: 忠诚的狗头人德金伴随着老大继续闯荡江湖。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Deekin's Middle of the Action ability by $amount%

description.original: The boss pretends not to notice that Deekin recently passed gas.
description.display: 老大假装没发现德金刚刚放了个屁。

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Deekin's Middle of the Action ability by $amount%

description.original: Ummm... is 'backpack' be one word or two?
description.display: 呃......背包是一个词还是两个字？

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Deekin's Middle of the Action ability by $amount%

description.original: Deekin hurts pretty bad. Is adventuring always likes this?
description.display: 德金这次伤得很严重。冒险时经常会这样受伤的吗？

description.original: Deekin gots complete confidence in you. Deekin knows that you is great hero, you is!
description.display: 德金对你有百分百的信心。德金相信你是位盖世豪侠！对的！

description.original: Deekin pretends not to notice that the boss' clothes have not been washed recently.
description.display: 德金假装没发现老大的衣服已经很多天没洗了。

description.original: We be in the dungeon with monsters! Ooooh yeah!
description.display: 我们进入了充斥着怪物的地下世界。太棒了！

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Male Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Kobold Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CHA score of 15 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Ranged Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: A former member of the Dripping Fang clan, Deekin was once a Skald for a White Dragon named Tymofarrar. Once he was released from Tymofarrar's service, he set out to become the most amazing storyteller in all of Faerûn. He yearns to sing and tell stories of heroic deeds, but his songs often devolve into 'tales' of the doom that is coming to him or his companions.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Deekin regales the party with his Story of Doom. Depending on how quickly the party's enemies are being slain, the intensity of Story of Doom can ramp up.

event_upgrades.name: Story of Doom
event_upgrades.description: Deekin increases the damage of those adjacent to him. The buff increases rapidly over time, but is reduced by monster kills.

event_upgrades.name: Confidence in The Boss
event_upgrades.description: When Deekin's Story of Doom stacks are low, monsters spawn more quickly.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 德金是滴血毒牙氏族的前成员，曾经为一只名叫泰默法拉的白龙担任吟游诗人。从泰默法拉的麾下离开后，他开始成为整个费伦最了不起的说书人。他渴望歌唱和讲述英雄事迹，但他的歌声却常常演变成他或他的同伴即将面临厄运的“故事”。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 德金会用他的“厄运故事”增强队伍。根据敌人被击杀的速度，“厄运故事”的强度也会提高。

display.description: 德金做好了应对一切的准备！全体看向德金！厄运！

original.name: Story of DOOOOM
original.description: Doomy doomy doom doom

effects.description: Increases the base effect of Deekin's Story of Doom ability by $amount%

display.name: 厄厄厄厄运故事
display.description: 糟了，糟了，糟了，糟了

effects.description: 使德金“厄运故事”技能的基础效果提升 $amount%

original.name: Bard of the Dragon Queen Deekin
Kobold Lute
original.description: Deekin great kobold hero, but still just little kobold.

display.name: 狗头人鲁特琴
display.description: 德金虽然是狗头人的大英雄，但终究只是个渺小的狗头人。

original.name: Cracked Lute
original.description: Ooo! You wants to hear Deekin sing! Deekin gladly sing for hero!

display.name: 破损的鲁特琴
display.description: 哦？你想要听德金唱歌？德金其实很乐意为英雄豪杰高歌一曲！

original.name: Deekin's Lute of Amazingness
original.description: The suspense builds! The music swells!

display.name: 德金的奇妙鲁特琴
display.description: 琵琶一曲肠堪断，风萧萧兮夜漫漫！

original.name: Magical Doomlute of Doom
original.description: He forgets how it goes, but nobody knows, 'cause Deekin's singing a so-ooong!!

display.name: 厄运魔法琵琶
display.description: 他忘了歌词，但却没人察觉，因为德金正在引吭高歌！！

original.name: Looted Crossbow
original.description: Is you talking to Deekin? You not the boss, so Deekin not gots to talk to you.

display.name: 战利品十字弩
display.description: 你是跟德金说话？你不是老大，德金才不搭理你。

original.name: Crossbow of Doom
original.description: Has Deekin told you recently about doom?

display.name: 厄运十字弩
display.description: 德金有跟你说过十字弩的故事吗？

original.name: Bloodstained Crossbow
original.description: Is hard to write epic story when blood be everywhere.

display.name: 溅血十字弩
display.description: 在浴血奋战时，的确难以抽空撰写一篇传奇故事。

original.name: Reverberating Crossbow
original.description: Doom doom DOOM! Doomity doom doom DOOM! You like?

display.name: 回荡十字弩
display.description: 厄运难逃！死亡的声音在空气中回荡！喜欢吗？

original.name: Moldy Parchment
original.description: Ummm... Deekin not feels so good.

display.description: 德金这次伤得很严重。冒险时经常会这样受伤的吗？

original.name: Stained Leather Armor
original.description: Deekin gots complete confidence in you. Deekin knows that you is great hero, you is!

display.name: 染血的皮甲
display.description: 德金对你有百分百的信心。德金相信你是位盖世豪侠！对的！

display.description: 德金假装没发现老大的衣服已经很多天没洗了。
